name: Savor
description: A lightweight, self-hosted recipe manager container designed for Proxmox VE LXC, featuring web imports, collections organization, FTS5 search, local storage, PIN locking, and full tarball backup/restore.
notes: No default collections - Savor starts empty for custom organization.
Authentication is enabled by default. Use admin@local with password 'recipe' to log in.
Backups copy the SQLite DB and locally optimized recipe images.
